research.status_summary: Actively hiring across sales, marketing, customer success, and R&D roles (as of May–Jun 2026), post-Series B with no signs of layoffs or acquisition.
research.hiring_policy: Sweep has an established R&D hub in Tel Aviv alongside offices in New York, Lisbon, and Madrid, and operates a work-from-anywhere policy; no explicit EOR or visa sponsorship language found publicly, but the distributed multi-country footprint suggests openness to international hires.
recent_news: Raised $22.5M Series B in May 2025 led by Insight Partners with participation from Bessemer Venture Partners, bringing total funding to ~$50.5M–$57.6M across 3 rounds.
Pivoted product positioning from 'Salesforce visual workspace' to 'the agentic layer for system metadata,' expanding coverage to HubSpot, ServiceNow, Snowflake, Marketo, NetSuite, and SAP.
Attended Salesforce TDX in San Francisco (April 15–16, 2026) as an active exhibitor, signaling continued go-to-market push into the Salesforce ecosystem.
research.growth_signal: Headcount grew to ~82 employees as of April 2026 (up from ~77 in February 2026), with Series B funds earmarked to scale engineering, GTM, and customer success teams.
research.fit_for_lior: Strong fit for the Vibe Coder and Product Analyst threads — Sweep's agentic, no-code/low-code Salesforce automation platform needs people who can bridge AI product thinking with RevOps workflows, and the Tel Aviv R&D office makes it a natural Israeli-local target.
